analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of Coolify.io covered 576 pages with 100% crawl coverage and 91.5% overall confidence. Critical issues include 58 confirmed broken internal documentation links requiring immediate remediation. API reference coverage stands at 63.82% across 130 detected API pages, indicating incomplete documentation. Example code reliability shows 0% detection across all 576 pages, flagged as a likely technical detection limitation due to JavaScript-rendered code blocks. Freshness tracking is strong at 96.53% last-updated coverage.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100% (576 of 576 pages within scope)
Strong freshness metadata coverage at 96.53% of pages
No repository navigation link breakage (0 repo_broken_links)
risks: 58 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrading user navigation and trust
API reference coverage gap at 63.82% leaves 36%+ of API surface undocumented
Example code reliability at 0% prevents validation of code accuracy (detection limitation suspected)
130 API pages detected but coverage incomplete suggests missing endpoints or methods
Broken links concentrated in user-facing docs (all 58 are docs_broken_links) impact customer experience
JavaScript-rendered code blocks may hide additional quality issues from automated detection
API confidence at 85% indicates moderate uncertainty in API documentation assessment

prioritized_actions.action: Audit and repair all 58 broken internal documentation links
Conduct manual API documentation completeness review to close 36% coverage gap
Implement server-side rendering or static code examples to enable automated reliability testing
Establish automated link checking in CI/CD pipeline to prevent future broken links
Manual spot-check of code examples across 20+ pages to validate accuracy despite detection failure

limitations: External audit cannot verify functional correctness of code examples when rendered via JavaScript (0% detection may underreport issues)
API coverage assessment limited to detected pages; undiscoverable or dynamically generated API endpoints not measured
Broken link detection covers structure only; cannot validate semantic accuracy or contextual relevance of link destinations
Freshness metadata presence confirmed but actual content currency requires subject matter expert review
Crawl-based analysis cannot assess gated content, authentication-required pages, or non-HTML documentation assets
